root: ^Norman: Wow... with that, I think we've seen all the fish in the harbor.
^Sam: You picked things up fast, Norman! You're a natural at this stuff!
^Norman: Haa... if only I had picked it up decades ago... could have made a fortune selling Rainbow Trout.

have_fun: ^Sam: Let me ask you a question:
^Sam: Did you have fun fishing today?
^Norman: Yeah... I would say I did.
^Sam: Then, why does it matter how much money you could have made?
^Sam: You've made it this far in life, why not do something for fun? Make yourself happy every day!
start_now: ^Sam: You can always start selling fish now! Buy yourself something nice, enjoy life!
^Norman: Will anyone buy fish from an old man like me?
^Sam: Why wouldn't they? They say old fishermen are the wisest of them all... If anything, they'll think your fish are probably the best.
ending: ^Norman: I suppose you have a point... Maybe I'll take a trip to the market after the catch today and try my luck.
^Norman: If I've still got any of it, I can get myself a boat before I die and go fish for the sharks out in open waters.
^Sam: You've got ambition! Don't hurt your back reeling those bastards in, I hear they put up a crazy fight!
^Norman: Don't worry kid, I'll drag you on the boat with me to reel those suckers in.
